chunks.text: Connect - EECS at Berkeley. Connect With Us. We have a strong tradition of collaboration across disciplinary and organizational boundaries, dedication to education and outreach, close ties to industry, and a supportive and inclusive culture.

Contact Berkeley EECS. K-12 Outreach. Our faculty and students collaborate on a range of activities to engage with students from kindergarten through high school. EE alumnus Paul Jacobs at the opening of Jacobs Hall in 2015.
Make a Gift to EECS. Your generous support can help to sustain and expand our programs to prepare tomorrow’s engineering leaders. Support Us. Cory Hall.

Pay a Visit to EECS. We welcome you to come to Berkeley and visit us in EECS. You could plan to attend a seminar or colloquium or visit our admissions staff, and then take time to walk around the beautiful UC campus. Visit Us. View. Open Faculty Positions.
